g.text: What an OCI image actually is
Each Dockerfile line that touches the filesystem produces one content-addressed layer.
Metadata-only lines (ENV, USER, ENTRYPOINT) update the config blob, not the layer stack.
layer stack — total ≈ 105 MB on disk
L4 (the jar) changes every build. L1–L3 change rarely. If you put COPY *.jar above RUN apk add,
the JDK layer rebuilds on every code change → 5-minute build instead of 30 seconds.
